scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,DESKTOP -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @odontocare/api" "npm run dev -w @odontocare/desktop"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.package:win: npm run runtime:build && npm run runtime:verify && npm run package -w @odontocare/desktop
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run runtime:build && npm run runtime:verify && npm run package:dir -w @odontocare/desktop
scripts.release:build: npm run verify && npm run package:win && npm run test:packaged && npm run release:verify
